---
title: "Junhyuck Kwon"
image: profile.jpg
about:
  template: jolla
  links:
    - icon: google
      text: Gmail
      href: mailto:jerrykbayes0814@gmail.com
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://linkedin.com/in/junhyuck-kwon
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/yeoamlog

---

About this blog
